plugins.name: Weather Widget
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Live weather in the header and garden. Hybrid city search across 1100+ Russian cities and worldwide Open-Meteo — know conditions before you step outside.

en.name: Weather Widget
en.description: Live weather in the header and garden. Hybrid city search across 1100+ Russian cities and worldwide Open-Meteo — know conditions before you step outside.

ru.name: Погода
ru.description: Погода в шапке и в саду. Гибридный поиск: 1100+ городов РФ и Open-Meteo по миру — узнайте условия перед выходом.

plugins.name: Time Widget
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: A calm always-on clock in the header with world time zones and a polished sheet — perfect for remote work without leaving your garden.

en.name: Time Widget
en.description: A calm always-on clock in the header with world time zones and a polished sheet — perfect for remote work without leaving your garden.

ru.name: Часы
ru.description: Живые часы в шапке с часовыми поясами и аккуратным sheet — удобно для удалёнки, не отрываясь от сада.

plugins.name: Radio Widget
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Curated SomaFM streams in the header with volume, sleep timer, and glass UI — focus music while habits stay one click away.

en.name: Radio Widget
en.description: Curated SomaFM streams in the header with volume, sleep timer, and glass UI — focus music while habits stay one click away.

ru.name: Радио
ru.description: Потоки SomaFM в шапке: громкость, таймер сна, стеклянный UI — музыка для фокуса рядом с привычками.

plugins.name: Pomodoro Timer
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Classic 25/5 pomodoro in the header with configurable work and break lengths — lightweight focus sprints between check-ins.

en.name: Pomodoro Timer
en.description: Classic 25/5 pomodoro in the header with configurable work and break lengths — lightweight focus sprints between check-ins.

ru.name: Помодоро
ru.description: Классический помодоро 25/5 в шапке с настройкой интервалов — короткие спринты фокуса между привычками.

plugins.name: Quote of the Day
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Daily inspiration card in your garden — 1000 curated quotes in EN and RU, favorites, and locale-pure banks.

en.name: Quote of the Day
en.description: Daily inspiration card in your garden — 1000 curated quotes in EN and RU, favorites, and locale-pure banks.

ru.name: Цитата дня
ru.description: Карточка вдохновения в саду — 1000 цитат EN/RU, избранное и чистые языковые банки.

plugins.name: Weekly Stats
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Garden analytics with a 7-day bar chart and weekly completion rate powered by Cultiva 2.0 — see momentum at a glance.

en.name: Weekly Stats
en.description: Garden analytics with a 7-day bar chart and weekly completion rate powered by Cultiva 2.0 — see momentum at a glance.

ru.name: Недельная статистика
ru.description: Аналитика в саду: график за 7 дней и процент недели на данных Cultiva 2.0 — импульс на одном экране.

plugins.name: Habit Reflection
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Opens a one-line micro-journal sheet right after you complete a habit — capture why it mattered in under five seconds.

en.name: Habit Reflection
en.description: Opens a one-line micro-journal sheet right after you complete a habit — capture why it mattered in under five seconds.

ru.name: Рефлексия привычки
ru.description: Однострочный журнал сразу после выполнения — зафиксируйте смысл привычки за несколько секунд.

plugins.name: Morning & Evening Routine
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: Morning and evening ritual checklists in the garden, matched to habits by name — start and end the day with intention.

en.name: Morning & Evening Routine
en.description: Morning and evening ritual checklists in the garden, matched to habits by name — start and end the day with intention.

ru.name: Утренний и вечерний ритуал
ru.description: Утренний и вечерний чеклист в саду по именам привычек — начало и завершение дня с намерением.

plugins.name: Gentle Nudge
plugins.author: krwg
plugins.description: A friendly in-app nudge after your chosen hour if habits remain open — supportive, not nagging, with configurable timing.

en.name: Gentle Nudge
en.description: A friendly in-app nudge after your chosen hour if habits remain open — supportive, not nagging, with configurable timing.

ru.name: Мягкое напоминание
ru.description: Мягкое напоминание после заданного часа, если привычки открыты — поддержка без навязчивости.
